narrative:
Upper Sandusky Ex Vill Sd (Wyandot) exempted village school district has 7,459 registered voters, with 49.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.1 percentage points.
